title: Kingswood Green® 4-Piece Garden Tool Gift Set | Ash Wooden Handles | Trowel, Hand Transplanter, Weeder & Fork | Made with Stainless Steel
features: Durable Construction: Crafted with anti-rust stainless steel and a weatherproof hardwood handle; built to endure years of use without fading or breaking under UV exposure
Precision Design: Ergonomically designed for quality and comfort, ensuring an exceptional gardening experience; made to last with superior craftsmanship that stands out from other tools
4-Piece Kit: Includes a trowel, hand transplanter with measurements, weeder, and garden fork; everything you need to start gardening with ease
Beautiful Gift Box: Includes a fully recyclable cardboard gift box, making it an ideal present for gardening enthusiasts; designed with sustainability in mind, with no plastic used in our tools
Support a Small UK Business: Proudly family-owned and operated in the UK; committed to providing excellent local customer support for your peace of mind
description: Product Description Essential tools for every garden Discover the joy of gardening with Kingswood Green garden tool set, a complete ensemble designed to elevate your gardening experience. Whether you're a seasoned gardener or just starting, our garden tool set equips you with the essentials to nurture your garden and bring your green space to life. It's the perfect companion for both indoor and outdoor gardening projects. Trowel A garden trowel is your trusted companion for precision digging, planting, and soil manipulation. Its sturdy design ensures you can effortlessly transplant flowers, herbs, and vegetables, making it an essential tool for any gardener. The ergonomic handle provides comfort during extended use, while the sharp blade effortlessly cuts through soil and roots. Hand transplanter (with measurements) Our hand transplanter, complete with measurements, simplifies the task of spacing and planting with precision. It features clear markings, allowing you to measure the perfect depth for your seeds or seedlings. This tool ensures your plants are properly spaced and nurtured, resulting in healthy growth and thriving gardens. Weeder Banish unwanted weeds with ease using our efficient weeder. This specialised tool is designed to remove weeds from their roots, preventing regrowth and maintaining the cleanliness of your garden beds. Its ergonomic handle and sharp blade make weeding a breeze, helping you maintain a weed-free paradise effortlessly. Garden fork The garden fork is your go-to tool for loosening, aerating, and turning over soil. Its sturdy tines effectively break up compacted earth, improving soil structure and promoting healthy root growth. Whether you're preparing your garden for planting or maintaining its vitality, the garden fork is an indispensable tool for the job. Quality and features Precision design Our tools are meticulously crafted for precision and comfort, ensuring they become your trusted companions in the garden. When compared to others, you'll easily notice the superior workmanship in steel manufacturing. We never compromise on quality, and it shows in every aspect of our tools. Durable construction Constructed with high-grade stainless steel, these tools are built to withstand the test of time. Say goodbye to rust and corrosion, as our anti-rust metal guarantees longevity. The weatherproof hardwood handles not only add a touch of elegance but also outlast silicone or plastic alternatives. Strong UV rays won't cause them to weather or fade, ensuring they remain in excellent condition season after season. Thoughtful packaging Our commitment to reducing carbon footprint extends to our packaging, which is consciously designed with sustainability in mind. Green logistics We take pride in our carbon-neutral logistics, ensuring that our products reach you with a minimal carbon footprint. Family owned We're a proud British family-owned business, and your support not only embraces quality but also contributes to our local community's growth.
